description: Kaito (KAITO) emerged in 2025 on Base as an AI-driven InfoFi platform token powering the flow of information, attention, and capital. NOW on AtlantisChain — the world’s ONLY ultra-super-fast Layer-0 blockchain with 3,600,000 TPS and 0.031-second block time — ATC-20 KAITO gives original KAITO holders and traders instant finality, fixed ultra-low gas fee, and AI contract capability, turning it into a much faster, more secure and scalable asset in the Atlantis Kingdom.
name: Kaito
